reviews.review_title: Game is broken or my vr is broken
reviews.review_description: It doesn't download I'll still give you game a 5 star ranking ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ but please help me fix this I do have alot of applab games give me a suggestion to help me download this game and more games so please help me I hope the owner or someone will tell me how

developer_response.body: im a week late but you gotta delete something. It happened to me with a game called "Monkey's Place". I just deleted a game i didn't play and it worked

reviews.review_description: I can’t even press the button I can’t do anything this game sucks

developer_response.body: try next update (tomorrow on the 21st of jan)

reviews.review_description: Very good game but the only thing is that the lag is so bad but overall it’s still a great game

developer_response.body: graphics settings next update so if you set it to low it decreases lag and battery usage (the update is on the 21st of jan)
